# User Guide

This section explains how users can work with the model.

## Step 1: Prepare input data

All input data should be saved in the `data/` folder.

Required variables in the example file are:

- `tax_type`
- `year`
- `revenue_baseline`
- `revenue_simulation`

## Step 2: Run the scripts

Run the following script:

```r
source("build_site.R")
```

## Step 3: Open the HTML website

After rendering, open:

```text
_book/index.html
```

## Step 4: Update the results

To update the website, replace the input file:

```text
data/tax_model_results.csv
```

Then run again:

```r
bookdown::render_book("index.Rmd")
```

## Optional: link to a Shiny app

You can also include a link to an interactive Shiny app:

```markdown
[Open VAT Simulation App](https://your-account.shinyapps.io/vat_app/)
```
